name: Testronaut Multi-Repo Codespace
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'set -e; mkdir -p /workspaces/mission-testronaut; cd /workspaces/mission-testronaut; for repo in testronaut-cli testronaut-examples; do if [ ! -d "$repo/.git" ]; then git clone https://github.com/mission-testronaut/$repo.git; fi; done'
postStartCommand: git config --global pull.rebase false && git config --global init.defaultBranch main
